_instructions: Per-session scoring input. Copy to runs/SN/session-SN.score.json. `ground_truth_items` come from your ground-truth.json with a `recalled` bool added. `reconstruction_claims` are the distinct PART-1 claims with a `grounded` bool. Optional per recalled item: `stale` bool (Q-STALE, Pass 3) — true if the reconstruction pins a quote/value superseded later in the same session; check the TRANSCRIPT's latest state, not the answer key. Omit `stale` when there is no pinnable state. See scoring/rubric.md. Delete _instructions when done.

reconstruction_claims.text: you committed to a GraphQL rewrite
